productDisplayName: Doodle Girl's Hippie Chic White Teen Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck and lightly ruffled puffed sleeves with orange piping, chest print with light metal embellishments, stitch detailing on the sides in the front and back and small butterfly print below the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printTransform your little darling into a princess with this top from doodle. The lightly puffed and ruffled sleeves and chest print add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a tiny skirt and colourful slippers to complete her princess look.
